headline: Kinder Morgan, Inc. (KMI) Adds $900M in New Gas Projects to Backlog, Goldman Sachs Reaffirms Buy Rating
summary: Kinder Morgan, Inc. (NYSE:KMI) ranks among the best spring stocks to buy right now. On January 30, Goldman Sachs reaffirmed its Buy rating on Kinder Morgan, Inc. (NYSE:KMI) with a $32 price target based on the company’s fourth-quarter 2025 results and 2026 forecast presentation.
